title: USCILab3D: A Large-scale, Long-term, Semantically Annotated Outdoor Dataset
title_zh: USCILab3D：大规模、长期、语义标注的室外数据集
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the USCILab3D dataset , a large-scale, annotated out-door dataset designed for versatile applications across multiple domains, including computer vision, robotics, and machine learning. The dataset was acquired using a mobile robot equipped with 5 cameras and a 32-beam, 360 ◦ scanning LIDAR. The robot was teleoperated, over the course of a year and under a variety of weather and lighting conditions, through a rich variety of paths within the USC campus (229 acres = ∼ 92 . 7 hectares). The raw data was annotated using state-of-the-art large foundation models, and processed to provide multi-view imagery, 3D reconstructions, semantically-annotated images and point clouds (267 semantic categories), and text descriptions of images and objects within. The dataset also offers a diverse array of complex analyses using pose-stamping and trajectory data. In sum, the dataset offers 1.4M point clouds and 10M images ( ∼ 6 TB of data). Despite covering a narrower geographical scope compared to a whole-city dataset, our dataset prioritizes intricate intersections along with denser multi-view scene images and semantic point clouds, enabling more precise 3D labelling and facilitating a broader spectrum of 3D vision tasks. For data, code and more details, please visit our website.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了USCILab3D数据集，这是一个大规模、带标注的室外数据集，适用于计算机视觉、机器人和机器学习等多个领域的多种应用。该数据集使用配备5个摄像头和32线360°扫描激光雷达的移动机器人采集。机器人在一年内、在各种天气和光照条件下，通过远程操作在南加州大学校园（229英亩≈92.7公顷）内丰富的路径上行驶。原始数据使用最先进的大型基础模型进行标注，并经过处理以提供多视图图像、3D重建、语义标注的图像和点云（267个语义类别），以及图像和其中物体的文本描述。该数据集还利用位姿标注和轨迹数据提供了多种复杂分析。总之，该数据集包含140万个点云和1000万张图像（约6TB数据）。尽管地理范围比全城数据集更窄，但我们的数据集侧重于复杂的交叉路口，以及更密集的多视图场景图像和语义点云，从而实现更精确的3D标注，并促进更广泛的3D视觉任务。有关数据、代码和更多详情，请访问我们的网站。
tldr_zh: 发布一个覆盖校园、含267类语义标注的大规模室外数据集。
cover_zh: 一年采集｜6TB数据｜这个室外数据集让3D标注更精准
